test_cases.input_summary: Drive Time, 6-minute live interview. Dr. Amara Osei, emergency medicine consultant. Topic: record A&E waiting times. Purpose: explanation and mild accountability. Sensitive framing around systemic vs individual failure.
test_cases.output_summary: Full cue sheet with scripted intro, factual reference card (5 bullets), 5 questions with follow-ups, and out-cue. Questions progress from open context-setting to challenge to listener-service. Sensitive framing respected throughout.
test_cases.notes: Presenter used cue sheet without amendment in dry run. Relevance slightly marked: the factual reference card included one bullet (ambulance handover time) not explicitly in the input but professionally reasonable to include.

test_cases.input_summary: Morning current affairs show, 4-minute pre-recorded interview. Finance director of a housing charity. Topic: new government affordable housing targets announced today. Purpose: accountability — targets missed for 5 consecutive years.
test_cases.output_summary: Cue sheet opens with a warm but direct intro. Questions move efficiently to accountability. Follow-ups for likely political deflections are well-targeted. Reference card accurate to input data. Out-cue is clean.
test_cases.notes: Strong relevance and professionalism. One question was slightly double-barrelled — presenter noted this and split it before recording. Minor coherence note: question 4 introduced a new subject (planning reform) not in the input brief.

test_cases.input_summary: Weekend magazine show, 8-minute human interest interview. Author who walked the entire coastline of a small island nation solo. Purpose: storytelling — why they did it, what they found, what it changed for them.
test_cases.output_summary: Tone shifts correctly to warm and curious. Intro sets scene well. Questions open up narrative space without boxing the guest in. Follow-ups are exploratory rather than challenging. Out-cue is conversational and warm.
test_cases.notes: Excellent register shift from news-accountability to human-interest mode. Relevance slightly marked: factual reference card included a geography note about the island that was not provided in the input. Listener-facing accuracy not at risk but worth noting.
